data.title: Ethereum Fusaka Upgrade Goes Live Today: Experts Predict Potential Supply Crunch Ahead
data.description:
The highly anticipated Fusaka Upgrade for Ethereum is on the verge of going live on Wednesday, heralding significant enhancements to the network’s overall functionality. Analysts contend that this pivotal development could usher in a considerable supply crunch for ETH, potentially boosting its price during a challenging period for the broader cryptocurrency market. Layer 2 Solutions To Boost ETH Burn According to analysts at Bull Theory, the Fusaka Upgrade integrates components from previous upgrades—Osaka, Fulu, and PeerDAS—but its most impactful feature is its resolution of one of Ethereum’s biggest challenges. Layers 2 (L2) solutions have long utilized Ethereum’s security while contributing minimal fees back to the network
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/ethereum-news/ethereum-fusaka-upgrade-goes-live-today-experts-predict-potential-supply-crunch-ahead/

data.title: Polymarket Launches App With CFTC Green Light in U.S. Return
data.description:
Polymarket, a decentralized prediction market platform, has successfully launched its new application following the green light from the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), marking a significant return to operations in the United States. This development represents a pivotal moment for the platform, as it aims to reestablish its presence in the U.S. market and offer users innovative ways to engage in prediction markets.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/12/03/polymarket-launches-app-with-cftc-green-light-in-u-s-return

data.title: Strategy Floats Possible Bitcoin Sales As MSCI Review Nears Deadline
data.description:
Bitcoin is trading near $92,000, up by about 5% over 24 hours, as attention turns to how index rules and treasury policy could intersect in coming weeks. MSCI has an active consultation on the treatment of companies whose treasuries hold digital assets or whose business models are materially linked to them, with feedback windows running […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/strategy-floats-possible-bitcoin-sales-as-msci-review-nears-deadline/

data.title: OpenAI Foundation Pledges $40.5 Million to Support U.S. Nonprofits
data.description: According to BlockBeats, OpenAI's nonprofit foundation has announced a donation of $40.5 million to 208 nonprofit organizations across the United States. This marks the largest external philanthropic commitment by the artificial intelligence giant to date. The funds are intended to expand opportunities in artificial intelligence, focusing on AI literacy and public understanding, community innovation, and economic opportunities. Despite being OpenAI's largest nonprofit expenditure, the donation is a small fraction compared to the foundation's equity value of approximately $130 billion following a recent corporate restructuring. A recent tax filing revealed that last year, the OpenAI Foundation donated $7.5 million.

data.title: DOJ Seizes Burma Crypto Scam Domain After Victims Lost Millions in Fake Trading Scheme
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/tai-chang-burma-domain-seized-by-us-doj/

data.title: Former SEC Chair Gensler Warns All Cryptos Are Risky — Except Bitcoin
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/former-sec-chair-gensler-warns-all-cryptos-are-risky-except-bitcoin/
